verdict_reasoning: MUC1 is a classical single-pass transmembrane mucin with an explicit CD227 designation and HGNC classification as a CD molecule. The NCBI summary confirms expression on the apical surface of epithelial cells. The protein is proteolytically cleaved into a membrane-anchored beta subunit and a large N-terminal alpha subunit bearing O-glycosylated mucin repeats that form a stable heterodimeric complex on the cell surface.
